summary: The user inquired about the best dim sum restaurants in Hong Kong and decided to try Lung King Heen due to its convenient location. facts: The user plans to try Lung King Heen for dim sum while in Hong Kong. Lung King Heen is located at the Four Seasons Hotel in Central, Hong Kong.
